FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Continued To May-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Trustee and the Attorney to appear on May 22, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the Twenty Third Account has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Continued To May-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Larson for petitioner Wells Fargo Bank.

Mr. Larson reported that there had been delays from personnel turnover in the Trustee's office and his firm, and that a complication factor was that rental from the apartment building which is an asset of the estate is received at the end of the month and takse some time to be reflected in the accounting statements. He requested a continuance of 60 days to complete and file the accounting. The matter was continued to May 8, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Vacated

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Feb-08-2017 Continued To Mar-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on March 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Twenty Third Account has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
